title: Currency & Recency
noRatings: No class ratings found. Add a license with class ratings to see currency status.
noCredentials: No credentials found. Add medicals and certificates to track validity.
noNightPrivilege: No night flying privilege for this license type
tier1Description: Determines whether you can fly at all in this class.
tier2Description: Determines whether you can carry passengers. You can still fly solo without passenger currency.
